description: Draft of the opening of a petition to 'al-majlis al-sāmī al-ajallī al-mawlawī. . . al-malikī al-muʿaẓẓamī al-muʿizzī al-manṣūrī..." This is found among various other jottings and pen exercises, on verso of a page containing Numbers 24:8-13. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
